mapper.select: SELECT CTN as ctn, DEVICE_TOKEN as deviceToken, MO_MSG as moMsg, MO_NUMBER as moNumber, MO_RCV_DATE as moRcvDate FROM USIM_AUTH_MGT WHERE CTN = #{ctn} AND DEVICE_TOKEN = #{deviceToken} WITH UR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USIM_AUTH_MGT (CTN, DEVICE_TOKEN, MO_MSG, MO_NUMBER, MO_RCV_DATE) VALUES ( #{ctn}, #{deviceToken}, #{moMsg}, #{moNumber}, #{moRcvDate} )
